final:
module divider_2bit (
    input [1:0] dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor == 2'b00) begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero
            remainder = dividend; // Remainder is the dividend
        end else begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (dividend == 2'b00) begin
        quotient = 2'b11;
        remainder = 2'b00;
      end else if (divisor == 2'b00) begin
        quotient = 2'b01;
        remainder = 2'b10;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
